verification.subject: Confirm your email address
verification.title: Confirm your email address
verification.bodyThanks: Thank you for joining tabarro3, the platform dedicated to raising awareness and promoting blood donation in Morocco.
verification.bodyConfirm: To complete your account setup and access all features, please confirm your email address by clicking the button below.
verification.securityNote: For security reasons, this link will expire in 24 hours. If you did not sign up, you can ignore this email.

passwordReset.subject: Reset your password
passwordReset.preview: Reset your tabarro3 password — this link expires in 60 minutes
passwordReset.title: Password reset
passwordReset.body: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to choose a new one:
passwordReset.expiryNote: For security reasons, this request will expire in 60 minutes. After that, you will need to submit a new request.
passwordReset.ignoreNote: If you didn't request this change, you can safely ignore this email.
passwordReset.linkHint: If the button does not work, copy and paste this link into your browser:

passwordChanged.subject: Your password has been changed
passwordChanged.preview: Your password was changed — wasn't you? Contact us immediately
passwordChanged.title: Password changed successfully
passwordChanged.body: This email confirms that your password has been changed successfully.
passwordChanged.contactNote: If you did not make this change, please contact our support team immediately:

invitation.subject: Invitation to join tabarro3.ma
invitation.preview: You have been invited to join tabarro3 — accept your invitation
invitation.title: Invitation to join tabarro3
invitation.body: We are pleased to invite you to join tabarro3, an innovative platform dedicated to raising awareness and promoting blood donation in Morocco. As an organization committed to this cause, your participation would be valuable to our shared mission.
invitation.bullet1: Organize and manage blood donation campaigns effectively
invitation.bullet2: Connect directly with an active community of potential donors
invitation.bullet3: Join a national network of organizations committed to blood donation
invitation.expiryNote: For security reasons, this invitation will expire in 7 days. After that, you will need to request a new invitation.
invitation.linkHint: If the button does not work, copy and paste this link into your browser:

campaignDigest.title: Daily campaigns summary
campaignDigest.intro: Here are the new blood donation campaigns organized today in your region:
campaignDigest.tip1: Eat well and stay hydrated before donating
campaignDigest.tip3: Allow about 45 minutes for the whole process
campaignDigest.tip4: Avoid intense physical activity after donating
campaignDigest.footerReason: You receive this daily summary because you are registered in the {regionName} region.
campaignDigest.unsubscribePrompt: No longer want to receive the campaign summary for your region?
campaignDigest.autoSent: This email is sent automatically. Please do not reply directly.

bloodRequest.title: URGENT BLOOD NEED
bloodRequest.intro: A {bloodGroup} blood donor is urgently needed. Your blood is compatible and can save a life!
bloodRequest.shareNote: If you cannot donate, please share this request with others. Every share can help save a life.
bloodRequest.unsubscribePrompt: No longer want to receive urgent blood request notifications?
bloodRequest.autoSent: This email is sent automatically. Please do not reply directly.
